observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with dye inconsistency
Visual pattern suggesting color variation or staining
Localized deviation from normal carpet appearance
mechanism_explanation: Uneven dye distribution or concentration variation during the coloring process.
severity_visual_description: minor color variation or staining visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Homogenize dye bath and control application temperature.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the color variation or staining would be absent and surface appears normal.
